title: × gymnacamptis reserata
intro: × Gymnacamptis reserata, also known as Gymnadenia conopsea subsp. reserata or the Reserata Orchid, is a rare, hybrid plant species in the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can aid in wound healing and infection prevention. The health benefits of × Gymnacamptis reserata include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. × Gymnacamptis reserata can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
